title: Verse 1
text:
kaṭhopaniṣat
uśan ha vai vājaśravasaḥ sarvavedasaṃ dadau /
tasya ha naciketā nāma putra āsa

title: Verse 2
text:
taṃ ha kumāraṃ santaṃ dakṣiṇāsu nīyamānāsu śraddhāviveśa /
so 'manyata

title: Verse 3
text:
pītodakā jagdhatṛṇā dugdhadohā nirindriyāḥ /
anandā nāma te lokās tān sa gacchati tā dadat

title: Verse 4
text:
sa hovāca pitaraṃ tata kasmai māṃ dāsyasīti /
dvitīyaṃ tṛtīyam /
taṃ hovāca mṛtyave tvā dadāmīti

title: Verse 5
text:
bahūnām emi prathamo bahūnām emi madhyamaḥ /
kiṃ svid yamasya kartavyaṃ yan mayādya kariṣyati

title: Verse 6
text:
anupaśya yathā pūrve pratipaśya tathāpare /
sasyam iva martyaḥ pacyate sasyam ivājāyate punaḥ

title: Verse 7
text:
vaiśvānaraḥ praviśati atithir brāhmaṇo gṛhān /
tasyaitāṃ śāntiṃ kurvanti hara vaivasvatodakam

title: Verse 8
text:
āśāpratīkṣe saṃgataṃ sūnṛtāṃ ca iṣṭāpūrte putrapaśūṃś ca sarvān /
etad vṛṅkte puruṣasyālpamedhaso yasyānaśnan vasati brāhmaṇo gṛhe

title: Verse 9
text:
tisro rātrīr yad avatsīr gṛhe me anaśnan brahmann atithir namasyaḥ /
namas te 'stu brahman svasti me 'stu tasmāt prati trīn varān vṛṇīṣva

title: Verse 10
text:
śāntasaṅkalpaḥ sumanā yathā syād vītamanyur gautamo mābhi mṛtyo /
tvatprasṛṣṭaṃ mābhivadet pratīta etat trayāṇāṃ prathamaṃ varaṃ vṛṇe

title: Verse 11
text:
yathā purastād bhavitā pratīta auddālakir āruṇir matprasṛṣṭaḥ /
sukhaṃ rātrīḥ śayitā vītamanyus tvāṃ dadṛśivān mṛtyumukhāt pramuktam

title: Verse 12
text:
svarge loke na bhayaṃ kiṃcanāsti na tatra tvaṃ na jarayā bibheti /
ubhe tīrtvā aśanāyāpipāse śokātigo modate svargaloke

title: Verse 13
text:
sa tvam agniṃ svargyam adhyeṣi mṛtyo prabrūhi taṃ śraddadhānāya mahyam /
svargalokā amṛtatvaṃ bhajanta etad dvitīyena vṛṇe vareṇa

title: Verse 14
text:
pra te bravīmi tad u me nibodha svargyam agniṃ naciketaḥ prajānan /
anantalokāptim atho pratiṣṭhāṃ viddhi tvam etaṃ nihitaṃ guhāyām

title: Verse 15
text:
lokādim agniṃ tam uvāca tasmai yā iṣṭakā yāvatīr vā yathā vā /
sa cāpi tat pratyavadad yathoktam athāsya mṛtyuḥ punar āha tuṣṭaḥ

title: Verse 16
text:
tam abravīt prīyamāṇo mahātmā varaṃ tavehādya dadāmi bhūyaḥ /
tavaiva nāmnā bhavitāyam agniḥ sṛṅkāṃ cemām anekarūpāṃ gṛhāṇa

title: Verse 17
text:
triṇāciketas tribhir etya sandhiṃ trikarmakṛt tarati janmamṛtyū /
brahmajajñaṃ devam īḍyaṃ viditvā nicāyyemāṃ śāntim atyantam eti

title: Verse 18
text:
triṇāciketas trayam etad viditvā ya evaṃ vidvāṃś cinute nāciketam /
sa mṛtyupāśān purataḥ praṇodya śokātigo modate svargaloke

title: Verse 19
text:
eṣa te 'gnir naciketaḥ svargyo yam avṛṇīthā dvitīyena vareṇa /
etam agniṃ tavaiva pravakṣyanti janāsas tṛtīyaṃ varaṃ naciketo vṛṇīṣva

title: Verse 20
text:
yeyaṃ prete vicikitsā manuṣye astīty eke nāyam astīti caike /
etad vidyām anuśiṣṭas tvayāhaṃ varāṇām eṣa varas tṛtīyaḥ

title: Verse 21
text:
devair atrāpi vicikitsitaṃ purā na hi sujñeyam aṇur eṣa dharmaḥ /
anyaṃ varaṃ naciketo vṛṇīṣva mā moparotsīr ati mā sṛjainam

title: Verse 22
text:
devair atrāpi vicikitsitaṃ kila tvaṃ ca mṛtyo yan na sujñeyam āttha /
vaktā cāsya tvādṛg anyo na labhyo nānyo varas tulya etasya kaścit

title: Verse 23
text:
śatāyuṣaḥ putrapautrān vṛṇīṣva bahūn paśūn hastihiraṇyam aśvān /
bhūmer mahad āyatanaṃ vṛṇīṣva svayaṃ ca jīva śarado yāvad icchasi

title: Verse 24
text:
etat tulyaṃ yadi manyase varaṃ vṛṇīṣva vittaṃ cirajīvikāṃ ca /
mahābhūmau naciketas tvam edhi kāmānāṃ tvā kāmabhājaṃ karomi

title: Verse 25
text:
ye ye kāmā durlabhā martyaloke sarvān kāmāṃś chandataḥ prārthayasva /
imā rāmāḥ sarathāḥ satūryā na hīdṛśā lambhanīyā manuṣyaiḥ /
ābhir matprattābhiḥ paricārayasva naciketo maraṇaṃ mānuprākṣīḥ

title: Verse 26
text:
śvobhāvā martyasya yad antakaitat sarvendriyāṇāṃ jarayanti tejaḥ /
api sarvaṃ jīvitam alpam eva tavaiva vāhās tava nṛtyagīte

title: Verse 27
text:
na vittena tarpaṇīyo manuṣyo lapsyāmahe vittam adrākṣma cet tvā /
jīviṣyāmo yāvad īśiṣyasi tvaṃ varas tu me varaṇīyaḥ sa eva

title: Verse 28
text:
ajīryatām amṛtānām upetya jīryan martyaḥ kvadhaḥsthaḥ prajānan /
abhidhyāyan varṇaratipramodān atidīrghe jīvite ko rameta

title: Verse 29
text:
yasminn idaṃ vicikitsanti mṛtyo yat sāmparāye mahati brūhi nas tat /
yo 'yaṃ varo gūḍham anupraviṣṭo nānyaṃ tasmān naciketā vṛṇīte

title: Verse 30
Verse 31
text:
śreyaś ca preyaś ca manuṣyam etas tau saṃparītya vivinakti dhīraḥ /
śreyo hi dhīro 'bhi preyaso vṛṇīte preyo mando yogakṣemād vṛṇīte

title: Verse 32
text:
sa tvaṃ priyān priyarūpāṃś ca kāmān abhidhyāyan naciketo 'tyasrākṣīḥ /
naitāṃ sṛṅkāṃ vittamayīm avāpto yasyāṃ majjanti bahavo manuṣyāḥ

title: Verse 33
text:
dūram ete viparīte viṣūcī avidyā yā ca vidyeti jñātā /
vidyābhīpsinaṃ naciketasaṃ manye na tvā kāmā bahavo 'lolupanta

title: Verse 34
text:
avidyāyām antare vartamānāḥ svayaṃ dhīrāḥ paṇḍitaṃ manyamānāḥ /
dandramyamāṇāḥ pariyanti mūḍhā andhenaiva nīyamānā yathāndhāḥ

title: Verse 35
text:
na sāmparāyaḥ pratibhāti bālaṃ pramādyantaṃ vittamohena mūḍham /
ayaṃ loko nāsti para iti mānī punaḥ punar vaśam āpadyate me

title: Verse 36
text:
śravaṇāyāpi bahubhir yo na labhyaḥ śṛṇvanto 'pi bahavo yaṃ na vidyuḥ /
āścaryo vaktā kuśalo 'sya labdhā āścaryo jñātā kuśalānuśiṣṭaḥ

title: Verse 37
text:
na nareṇāvareṇa prokta eṣa suvijñeyo bahudhā cintyamānaḥ /
ananyaprokte gatir atra nāsty aṇīyān hy atarkyam aṇupramāṇāt

title: Verse 38
text:
naiṣā tarkeṇa matir āpaneyā proktānyenaiva sujñānāya preṣṭha /
yāṃ tvam āpaḥ satyadhṛtir batāsi tvādṛṅ no bhūyān naciketaḥ preṣṭā

title: Verse 39
text:
jānāmy ahaṃ śevadhir ity anityaṃ na hy adhruvaiḥ prāpyate hi dhruvaṃ tat /
tato mayā nāciketaś cito 'gnir anityair dravyaiḥ prāptavān asmi nityam

title: Verse 40
text:
kāmasya āptiṃ jagataḥ pratiṣṭhāṃ krator anantyam abhayasya pāram /
stomamahad urugāyaṃ pratiṣṭhāṃ dṛṣṭvā dhṛtyā dhīro naciketo 'tyasrākṣīḥ

title: Verse 41
text:
taṃ durdarśaṃ gūḍham anupraviṣṭaṃ guhāhitaṃ gahvareṣṭhaṃ purāṇam /
adhyātmayogādhigamena devaṃ matvā dhīro harṣaśokau jahāti

title: Verse 42
text:
etac chrutvā saṃparigṛhya martyaḥ pravṛhya dharmyam aṇum etam āpya /
sa modate modanīyaṃ hi labdhvā vivṛtaṃ sadma naciketasaṃ manye

title: Verse 43
text:
anyatra dharmād anyatrādharmād anyatrāsmāt kṛtākṛtāt /
anyatra bhūtāc ca bhavyāc ca yat tat paśyasi tad vada

title: Verse 44
text:
sarve vedā yat padam āmananti tapāṃsi sarvāṇi ca yad vadanti /
yad icchanto brahmacaryaṃ caranti tat te padaṃ saṃgraheṇa bravīmi //
om ity etat

title: Verse 45
text:
etad dhy evākṣaraṃ brahma etad dhy evākṣaraṃ param /
etad dhy evākṣaraṃ jñātvā yo yad icchati tasya tat

title: Verse 46
text:
etad ālambanaṃ śreṣṭham etad ālambanaṃ param /
etad ālambanaṃ jñātvā brahmaloke mahīyate

title: Verse 47
text:
na jāyate mriyate vā vipaścin nāyaṃ kutaścin na babhūva kaścit /
ajo nityaḥ śāśvato 'yaṃ purāṇo na hanyate hanyamāne śarīre

title: Verse 48
text:
hantā cen manyate hantuṃ hataś cen manyate hatam /
ubhau tau na vijānīto nāyaṃ hanti na hanyate

title: Verse 49
text:
aṇor aṇīyān mahato mahīyān ātmāsya jantor nihito guhāyām /
tam akratuḥ paśyati vītaśoko dhātuprasādān mahimānam ātmanaḥ

title: Verse 50
text:
āsīno dūraṃ vrajati śayāno yāti sarvataḥ /
kas taṃ madāmadaṃ devaṃ mad anyo jñātum arhati

title: Verse 51
text:
aśarīraṃ śarīreṣu anavastheṣv avasthitam /
mahāntaṃ vibhum ātmānaṃ matvā dhīro na śocati

title: Verse 52
text:
nāyam ātmā pravacanena labhyo na medhayā na bahunā śrutena /
yam evaiṣa vṛṇute tena labhyas tasyaiṣa ātmā vivṛṇute tanūṃ svām

title: Verse 53
text:
nāvirato duścaritān nāśānto nāsamāhitaḥ /
nāśāntamānaso vāpi prajñānenainam āpnuyāt

title: Verse 54
text:
yasya brahma ca kṣatraṃ ca ubhe bhavata odanaḥ /
mṛtyur yasyopasecanaṃ ka itthā veda yatra saḥ

title: Verse 55
Verse 56
text:
yaḥ setur ījānānām akṣaraṃ brahma yat param /
abhayaṃ titīrṣatāṃ pāraṃ nāciketaṃ śakemahi

title: Verse 57
text:
ātmānaṃ rathinaṃ viddhi śarīraṃ ratham eva tu /
buddhiṃ tu sārathiṃ viddhi manaḥ pragraham eva ca

title: Verse 58
text:
indriyāṇi hayān āhur viṣayāṃs teṣu gocarān /
ātmendriyamanoyuktaṃ bhoktety āhur manīṣiṇaḥ

title: Verse 59
text:
yas tv avijñānavān bhavaty ayuktena manasā sadā /
tasyendriyāṇy avaśyāni duṣṭāśvā iva sāratheḥ

title: Verse 60
text:
yas tu vijñānavān bhavati yuktena manasā sadā /
tasyendriyāṇi vaśyāni sadaśvā iva sāratheḥ

title: Verse 61
text:
yas tv avijñānavān bhavaty amanaskaḥ sadāśuciḥ /
na sa tat padam āpnoti saṃsāraṃ cādhigacchati

title: Verse 62
text:
yas tu vijñānavān bhavati samanaskaḥ sadā śuciḥ /
sa tu tat padam āpnoti yasmād bhūyo na jāyate

title: Verse 63
text:
vijñānasārathir yas tu manaḥ pragrahavān naraḥ /
so 'dhvanaḥ pāram āpnoti tad viṣṇoḥ paramaṃ padam

title: Verse 64
text:
indriyebhyaḥ parā hy arthā arthebhyaś ca paraṃ manaḥ /
manasas tu parā buddhir buddher ātmā mahān paraḥ

title: Verse 65
text:
mahataḥ param avyaktam avyaktāt puruṣaḥ paraḥ /
puruśān na paraṃ kiṃcit sā kāṣṭhā sā parā gatiḥ

title: Verse 66
text:
eṣa sarveṣu bhūteṣu gūḍho 'tmā na prakāśate /
dṛṣyate tv agryayā buddhyā sūkṣmayā sūkṣmadarśibhiḥ

title: Verse 67
text:
yacched vāṅmanasī prājñas tad yacchej jñāna ātmani /
jñānam ātmani mahati niyacchet tad yacchec chānta ātmani

title: Verse 68
text:
uttiṣṭhata jāgrata prāpya varān nibodhata /
kṣurasya dhārā niśitā duratyayā durgaṃ pathas tat kavayo vadanti

title: Verse 69
text:
aśabdam asparśam arūpam avyayaṃ tathārasaṃ nityam agandhavac ca yat /
anādy anantaṃ mahataḥ paraṃ dhruvaṃ nicāyya tan mṛtyumukhāt pramucyate

title: Verse 70
text:
nāciketam upākhyānaṃ mṛtyuproktaṃ sanātanam /
uktvā śrutvā ca medhāvī brahmaloke mahīyate

title: Verse 71
text:
ya imaṃ paramaṃ guhyaṃ śrāvayed brahmasaṃsadi /
prayataḥ śrāddhakāle vā tad ānantyāya kalpate /
tad ānantyāya kalpata iti

title: Verse 72
Verse 73
text:
parācaḥ kāmān anuyanti bālās te mṛtyor yanti vitatasya pāśam /
atha dhīrā amṛtatvaṃ viditvā dhruvam adhruveṣv iha na prārthayante

title: Verse 74
text:
yena rūpaṃ rasaṃ gandhaṃ śabdān sparśīṃś ca maithunān /
etenaiva vijānāti kim atra pariśiṣyate //
etad vai tat

title: Verse 75
text:
svapnāntaṃ jāgaritāntaṃ cobhau yenānupaśyati /
mahāntaṃ vibhum ātmānaṃ matvā dhīro na śocati

title: Verse 76
text:
ya imaṃ madhvadaṃ veda ātmānaṃ jīvam antikāt /
īśānaṃ bhūtabhavyasya na tato vijugupsate //
etad vai tat

title: Verse 77
text:
yaḥ pūrvaṃ tapaso jātam adbhyaḥ pūrvam ajāyata /
guhāṃ praviśya tiṣṭhantaṃ yo bhūtebhir vyapaśyata //
etad vai tat

title: Verse 78
text:
yā prāṇena saṃbhavati aditir devatāmayī /
guhāṃ praviśya tiṣṭhantīṃ yā bhūtebhir vyajāyata //
etad vai tat

title: Verse 79
text:
araṇyor nihito jātavedā garbha iva subhṛto garbhiṇībhiḥ /
divediva īḍyo jāgṛvadbhir haviṣmadbhir manuṣyebhir agniḥ //
etad vai tat

title: Verse 80
text:
yataś codeti sūryo astaṃ yatra ca gacchati /
taṃ devāḥ sarve arpitās tad u nātyeti kaścana //
etad vai tat

title: Verse 81
text:
yad eveha tad amutra yad amutra tad anv iha /
mṛtyoḥ sa mṛtyum āpnoti ya iha nāneva paśyati

title: Verse 82
text:
manasaivedam āptavyaṃ neha nānāsti kiṃcana /
mṛtyoḥ sa mṛtyuṃ gacchati ya iha nāneva paśyati

title: Verse 83
text:
aṅguṣṭhamātraḥ puruṣo madhya ātmani tiṣṭhati /
īśāno bhūtabhavyasya na tato vijugupsate //
etad vai tat

title: Verse 84
text:
aṅguṣṭhamātraḥ puruṣo jyotir iva adhūmakaḥ /
īśāno bhūtabhavyasya sa evādya sa u śvaḥ //
etad vai tat

title: Verse 85
text:
yathodakaṃ durge vṛṣṭaṃ parvateṣu vidhāvati /
evaṃ dharmān pṛthak paśyaṃs tān evānu vidhāvati

title: Verse 86
text:
yathodakaṃ śuddhe śuddham āsiktaṃ tādṛg eva bhavati /
evaṃ muner vijānata ātmā bhavati gautama

title: Verse 87
text:
// iti caturthī vallī //
puram ekādaśadvāram ajasyāvakracetasaḥ /
anuṣṭhāya na śocati vimuktaś ca vimucyate //
etad vai tat

title: Verse 88
text:
haṃsaḥ śuciṣad vasur antarikṣasad dhotā vediṣad atithir duroṇasat /
nṛṣad varasad ṛtasad vyomasad abjā gojā ṛtajā adrijā ṛtaṃ bṛhat

title: Verse 89
text:
ūrdhvaṃ prāṇam unnayati apānaṃ pratyag asyati /
madhye vāmanam āsīnaṃ viśve devā upāsate

title: Verse 90
text:
asya visraṃsamānasya śarīrasthasya dehinaḥ /
dehād vimucyamānasya kim atra pariśiṣyate //
etad vai tat

title: Verse 91
text:
na prāṇena nāpānena martyo jīvati kaścana /
itareṇa tu jīvanti yasminn etāv upāśritau

title: Verse 92
text:
hanta ta idaṃ pravakṣyāmi guhyaṃ brahma sanātanam /
yathā ca maraṇaṃ prāpya ātmā bhavati gautama

title: Verse 93
text:
yonim anye prapadyante śarīratvāya dehinaḥ /
sthāṇum anye 'nusaṃyanti yathākarma yathāśrutam

title: Verse 94
text:
ya eṣa supteṣu jāgarti kāmaṃ kāmaṃ puruṣo nirmimāṇaḥ /
tad eva śukraṃ tad brahma tad evāmṛtam ucyate /
tasmiṃl lokāḥ śritāḥ sarve tad u nātyeti kaścana //
etad vai tat

title: Verse 95
text:
agnir yathaiko bhuvanaṃ praviṣṭo rūpaṃ rūpaṃ pratirūpo babhūva /
ekas tathā sarvabhūtāntarātmā rūpaṃ rūpaṃ pratirūpo bahiś ca

title: Verse 96
text:
vāyur yathaiko bhuvanaṃ praviṣṭo rūpaṃ rūpaṃ pratirūpo babhūva /
ekas tathā sarvabhūtāntarātmā rūpaṃ rūpaṃ pratirūpo bahiś ca

title: Verse 97
text:
sūryo yathā sarvalokasya cakṣur na lipyate cākṣuṣair bāhyadoṣaiḥ /
ekas tathā sarvabhūtāntarātmā na lipyate lokaduḥkhena bāhyaḥ

title: Verse 98
text:
eko vaśī sarvabhūtāntarātmā ekaṃ rūpaṃ bahudhā yaḥ karoti /
tam ātmasthaṃ ye 'nupaśyanti dhīrās teṣāṃ sukhaṃ śāśvataṃ netareṣām

title: Verse 99
text:
nityo 'nityānāṃ cetanaś cetanānām eko bahūnāṃ yo vidadhāti kāmān /
tam ātmasthaṃ ye 'nupaśyanti dhīrās teṣaṃ śāntiḥ śāśvatī netareṣām

title: Verse 100
text:
tad etad iti manyante 'nirdeśyaṃ paramaṃ sukham /
kathaṃ nu tad vijānīyāṃ kim u bhāti vibhāti vā

title: Verse 101
text:
na tatra sūryo bhāti na candratārakaṃ nemā vidyuto bhānti kuto 'yam agniḥ /
tam eva bhāntam anu bhāti sarvaṃ tasya bhāsā sarvam idaṃ vibhāti

title: Verse 102
text:
// iti pañcamī vallī //
ūrdhvamūlo avākśākha eṣo 'śvatthaḥ sanātanaḥ /
tad eva śukraṃ tad brahma tad evāmṛtam ucyate /
tasmiṃl lokāḥ śritāḥ sarve tad u nātyeti kaścana //
etad vai tat

title: Verse 103
text:
yad idaṃ kiṃca jagat sarvaṃ prāṇa ejati niḥsṛtam /
mahad bhayaṃ vajram udyataṃ ya etad vidur amṛtās te bhavanti

title: Verse 104
text:
bhayād asyāgnis tapati bhayāt tapati sūryaḥ /
bhayād indraś ca vāyuś ca mṛtyur dhāvati pañcamaḥ

title: Verse 105
text:
iha ced aśakad boddhuṃ prākśarīrasya visrasaḥ /
tataḥ sargeṣu lokeṣu śarīratvāya kalpate

title: Verse 106
text:
yathādarśe tathātmani yathā svapne tathā pitṛloke /
yathāpsu parīva dadṛśe tathā gandharvaloke chāyātapayor iva brahmaloke

title: Verse 107
text:
indriyāṇāṃ pṛthagbhāvam udayāstamayau ca yat /
pṛthag utpadyamānānāṃ matvā dhīro na śocati

title: Verse 108
text:
indriyebhyaḥ paraṃ mano manasaḥ sattvam uttamam /
sattvād adhi mahānātmā mahato 'vyaktam uttamam

title: Verse 109
text:
avyaktāt tu paraḥ puruṣo vyāpako 'liṅga eva ca /
yaṃ jñātvā mucyate jantur amṛtatvaṃ ca gacchati

title: Verse 110
text:
na saṃdṛśe tiṣṭhati rūpam asya na cakṣuṣā paśyati kaścanainam /
hṛdā manīṣā manasābhikḷpto ya etad vidur amṛtās te bhavanti

title: Verse 111
text:
yadā pañcāvatiṣṭhante jñānāni manasā saha /
buddhiś ca na viceṣṭati tām āhuḥ paramāṃ gatim

title: Verse 112
text:
tāṃ yogam iti manyante sthirām indriyadhāraṇām /
apramattas tadā bhavati yogo hi prabhavāpyayau

title: Verse 113
text:
naiva vācā na manasā prāptuṃ śakyo na cakṣuṣā /
astīti bruvato 'nyatra kathaṃ tad upalabhyate

title: Verse 114
text:
astīty evopalabdhavyas tattvabhāvena cobhayoḥ /
astīty evopalabdhasya tattvabhāvaḥ prasīdati

title: Verse 115
text:
yadā sarve pramucyante kāmā ye 'sya hṛdi śritāḥ /
atha martyo 'mṛto bhavaty atra brahma samaśnute

title: Verse 116
text:
yadā sarve prabhidyante hṛdayasyeha granthayaḥ /
atha martyo 'mṛto bhavaty etāvad dhy anuśāsanam

title: Verse 117
text:
śataṃ caikā ca hṛdayasya nāḍyas tāsāṃ mūrdhānam abhiniḥsṛtaikā /
tayordhvam āyann amṛtatvam eti viṣvaṅṅ anyā utkramaṇe bhavati

title: Verse 118
text:
aṅguṣṭhamātraḥ puruṣo 'ntarātmā sadā janānāṃ hṛdaye saṃniviṣṭaḥ /
taṃ svāc charīrāt pravṛhen muñjād iveṣīkāṃ dhairyeṇa /
taṃ vidyāc chukram amṛtaṃ taṃ vidyāc chukram amṛtam iti

title: Verse 119
text:
mṛtyuproktāṃ naciketo 'tha labdhvā vidyām etāṃ yogavidhiṃ ca kṛtsnam /
brahmaprāpto virajo 'bhūd vimṛtyur anyo 'py evaṃ yo vid adhyātmam eva
